title: 2,000 Miles On My Legs Vlog - Bike Touring Through Europe 5-2010

transcript.text: Hello this is my 2,000 miles on my legs blog since the beginning of March I did 200 miles
In March and then since April 7th I've put the 2,000 so in a month and a week I've put
The 2,000 or the 1,800 um my muscle legs my leg muscles are starting to come in there my legs
Are bigger and I can see more muscles in my legs than I could at 1,000 miles and my belly is smaller
Although I still have a belly and my muscles I guess are a little bit smaller although I still
Have the muscles um yeah and my lungs are better although I still have the asthma as I ride some
I'm definitely not in shape um I'm definitely going to be a lot more in shape after 3,000 miles
Than 2,000 miles as far as making predictions um like when am I going to feel like I'm in really
Good shape um I mean it's raining right now I mean if it keeps raining I'm not going to be able to ride
Hard and you have to ride hard to get in shape unless you're riding like 12 hours a day but
It's kind of hard to ride 12 hours a day when it's raining every day so I'd like to figure out a way
To get my ass into uh it's part of Europe where it's not raining every day um but um yeah I think
I'll feel like I'm actually I'm starting to feel like I'm in shape now I was riding like day before
Yesterday um I was going really fast yeah I'm definitely a lot faster now than I was at zero
Miles and faster than at 1,000 so after 3,000 I'll be um I'll be uh I'll be stronger and then I'll be
Even stronger I think after 4,000 um I think I'm just basically going to progressively be getting
Stronger all the way up until I'm done with the tour um my um my belly I think my belly like when my belly
Ever go away I think it will like if I don't if it stops raining um I think my belly will go away
After 4,000 miles 4,000 mile blog the belly will lungs I'm saying lungs will be gone at 5,000 oh now
It's raining hard um that's about all I have to say um I mean my legs still get sore when I ride a lot
Although I have not been overtraining at all which in a long run could be a good thing because I just
You know I'm kind of starting from scratch so it's like as soon as my legs get kind of soresh
Then I stop riding for whatever reason you know like I was in Auschwitz and my legs were a little
Bit sore even though I only rode 30 miles that day the day before I kicked a whole day off at Auschwitz
And then I rode 85 yesterday and then only 40 today so and my legs aren't sore at all right now
So although if I do start to like ride really hard at the beginning I could probably feel my legs be
Sore so you know my legs aren't totally like the point where I can ride hard every day and not get
Sore so I'm still kind of getting up there so anyways that's my 2,000 miles on my leg blog
